title: product-file
description: One JSON file per product (e.g. qshs.json, vs.json, qs_gate.json), living under supabase/seeds/<org-slug>/products/. Groups all table rows under table-name keys. Gates are authored in their own file (e.g. qs_gate.json), not nested under a fence file. The Node upserter at supabase/seeds/tools/seed-products.js reads files matching this schema and upserts each section in dependency order (products → product_components → pricing_rules → calculator_configs). Calculation rules are NOT seed data — they live in code+config under supabase/functions/bom-calculator-static/config/; calculator_configs carries only per-org sparse overlay patches deep-merged over those base configs.

org_slug.description: Business key for the owning organisation. Applied to every row in this file — do NOT repeat org_slug on individual rows.

calculator_configs.description: Per-org sparse CalculatorConfig overlay patches, upserted into supplier_product_calculator_configs and deep-merged over BASE_CONFIGS at request time. Arrays in a patch REPLACE the base array wholesale (e.g. fields, profiles); objects merge recursively. Top-level config keys are validated against the engine's CalculatorConfig shape by the seeder.

product_code.description: Must match a BASE_CONFIGS key (config/base.ts) — the edge functions silently ignore overlay rows for unknown product codes.
